records.ety: [L. supremus, superlative of superus that is above, upper, fr. super above: cf. F. suprme. See Super-, and cf. Sum.]

defs: Highest in authority; holding the highest place in authority, government, or power.
quotes: He that is the supreme King of kings.

defs: Highest; greatest; most excellent or most extreme; utmost; greatist possible (sometimes in a bad sense); as, supreme love; supreme glory; supreme magnanimity; supreme folly.
quotes: Each would be supreme within its own sphere, and those spheres could not but clash.

defs: Situated at the highest part or point.
